mapper.select: SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description as productDescription, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT a.dat_id as id, a.customer_id as customerId, a.product_id as productId, a.account_number as accountNumber, a.account_password as accountPassword, a.balance, a.interest_rate as interestRate, a.account_status as accountStatus, a.auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, a.auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, a.auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, a.created_at as createdAt, a.updated_at as updatedAt, a.nickname, p.product_name as productName, -- ✅ 상품명 추가 p.product_type as productType, -- ✅ 상품유형 추가 p.term_months as termMonths -- ✅ 기간(개월) 추가 FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL a JOIN DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL p ON a.product_id = p.product_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.dat_id DESC

SELECT a.sat_id as id, a.customer_id as customerId, a.product_id as productId, a.account_number as accountNumber, a.account_password as accountPassword, a.balance, a.interest_rate as interestRate, a.account_status as accountStatus, a.monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, a.maturity_date as maturityDate, a.created_at as createdAt, a.updated_at as updatedAt, a.nickname, p.product_name as productName, -- ✅ 상품명 추가 p.product_type as productType, -- ✅ 상품유형 추가 p.term_months as termMonths -- ✅ 기간(개월) 추가 FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL a JOIN SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL p ON a.product_id = p.product_id WHERE a.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY a.sat_id DESC

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description as productDescription, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT product_id as id, product_name as productName, product_type as productType, interest_rate as interestRate, min_amount as minAmount, max_amount as maxAmount, term_months as termMonths, description, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL WHERE product_id = #{productId}

SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}

SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, auto_transfer_enabled, auto_transfer_amount, auto_transfer_day, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, #{balance}, #{interestRate}, 'ACTIVE', #{autoTransferEnabled}, #{autoTransferAmount}, #{autoTransferDay}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL ( customer_id, product_id, account_number, account_password, balance, interest_rate, account_status, monthly_amount, maturity_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{productId}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountPassword}, #{monthlyAmount}, #{interestRate}, 'ACTIVE', #{monthlyAmount}, #{maturityDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT account_number FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL UNION ALL SELECT account_number FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL ) AS all_accounts WHERE account_number = #{accountNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND balance >= #{amount} -- 출금 가능 체크
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND balance >= #{amount} -- 출금 가능 체크
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL ( dat_id, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, transaction_date ) VALUES ( #{transaction.accountId}, #{transaction.transactionType}, #{transaction.transactionAmount}, #{transaction.transactionAmount}, #{transaction.transactionDescription}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL ( sat_id, transaction_type, amount, balance, description, transaction_date ) VALUES ( #{transaction.accountId}, #{transaction.transactionType}, #{transaction.transactionAmount}, #{transaction.balance}, #{transaction.transactionDescription}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id AS id, dat_id AS accountId, transaction_type AS transactionType, amount AS transactionAmount, balance, description AS transactionDescription, transaction_date AS transactionDate FROM DEPOSIT_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC

SELECT transaction_id AS id, -- 적금 거래 PK sat_id AS accountId, -- 적금 계좌 ID, transaction_type AS transactionType, amount AS transactionAmount, balance, description AS transactionDescription, transaction_date AS transactionDate FROM SAVINGS_TRANSACTION_TBL WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND transaction_date BETWEEN #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ORDER BY transaction_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET auto_transfer_enabled = #{enabled}, auto_transfer_amount = #{amount}, auto_transfer_day = #{transferDay}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND auto_transfer_enabled = true AND auto_transfer_day = #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND maturity_date = #{today}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET account_status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT dat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, auto_transfer_enabled as autoTransferEnabled, auto_transfer_amount as autoTransferAmount, auto_transfer_day as autoTransferDay, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND DAY(created_at) = DAY(#{today})

SELECT sat_id as id, customer_id as customerId, product_id as productId, account_number as accountNumber, account_password as accountPassword, balance, interest_rate as interestRate, account_status as accountStatus, monthly_amount as monthlyAmount, maturity_date as maturityDate, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL WHERE account_status = 'ACTIVE' AND DAY(created_at) = DAY(#{today})
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET balance = balance + #{interestAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId} AND account_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL (product_name, product_type, interest_rate, min_amount, max_amount, term_months, description, created_at, updated_at, account_type) VALUES (#{productName}, #{productType}, #{interestRate}, #{minAmount}, #{maxAmount}, #{termMonths}, #{productDescription}, NOW(), NOW(),'DEPOSIT')
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_PRODUCT_TBL SET product_name = #{dto.productName}, product_type = #{dto.productType}, interest_rate = #{dto.interestRate}, min_amount = #{dto.minAmount}, max_amount = #{dto.maxAmount}, term_months = #{dto.termMonths}, description = #{dto.productDescription}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL (product_name, product_type, interest_rate, min_amount, max_amount, term_months, description, created_at, updated_at,account_type) VALUES (#{productName}, #{productType}, #{interestRate}, #{minAmount}, #{maxAmount}, #{termMonths}, #{productDescription}, NOW(), NOW(),'SAVINGS')
mapper.update: UPDATE SAVINGS_PRODUCT_TBL SET product_name = #{dto.productName}, product_type = #{dto.productType}, interest_rate = #{dto.interestRate}, min_amount = #{dto.minAmount}, max_amount = #{dto.maxAmount}, term_months = #{dto.termMonths}, description = #{dto.productDescription}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_TBL SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE dat_id = #{accountId}
UPDATE SAVINGS_ACCOUNT_TBL SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sat_id = #{accountId}
mapper.select: SELECT account_number FROM account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT withdraw_account_number AS withdrawAccountNumber, target_account_number AS targetAccountNumber, transfer_amount AS transferAmount FROM AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE transfer_day = #{today} AND transfer_status = 'ACTIVE'
